title: Hrb Variety Fruit-Flavoured Limited Edition Jelly Sweets – Twin Snakes, Sour Sparks & Heart Throbs Mix (500g, Twin Snakes Sweets)
features: VARIETY PACK: Features three popular sweets - Twin Snakes, Sour Sparks, and Heart Throbs in one convenient limited edition mix
TWIN SNAKES: Dual-flavoured gummy snakes combining sweet and sour fruit flavours for an exciting taste experience
SOUR SPARKS: Tangy, fruit-flavoured jelly sweets with an electrifying sour coating for intense flavour sensation
HEART THROBS: Sweet, heart-shaped fruit jelly sweets perfect for sharing or treating yourself
FRUIT FLAVOURS: Delicious assortment of fruit-flavoured gummy sweets
description: Product description Indulge in a delightful assortment of finest fruit-flavoured jelly sweets with this limited edition variety mix. This special collection brings together three beloved favourites: the playful Twin Snakes, the tantalising Sour Sparks, and the charming Heart Throbs. Each piece offers a unique taste adventure, combining signature chewy texture with vibrant fruit flavours that dance on your tongue. The Twin Snakes deliver a dual-flavoured experience, whilst Sour Sparks add an exciting zingy twist to your sweet treat moment. The Heart Throbs round out the mix with their loveable shapes and fruity taste. Perfect for sharing at parties, movie nights, or simply enjoying as a special treat, this variety mix provides a delightful sampling of confectionery craftsmanship. Keep these sweets in a cool, dry place to maintain their perfect texture and flavour. Ingredients Sugar, Corn Syrup, Modified Corn Starch, Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid, Malic Acid, Fumaric Acid, Sodium Citrate, Flavoruing, Stabiliser: Dextrin, Triglycerides Of Fatty Acids; Glazing Agent: Shellac, Carnauba Wax; Colour: Allura Red, Brilliant Blue, Tartrazine.
